column1: # Quest 5 corpus regression manifest: <game-basename> TAB <walkthrough-file> TAB <mode>
#   hints             -> Q&A/prose only, no linear command script; runner skips
# optional 4th column (preamble): ";"-separated commands prepended before the
#   walkthrough, for a game whose walkthrough assumes a title-screen menu was
#   already dismissed (e.g. Dream Pieces needs "new game" or every command fails).
# The 24 games with a walkthrough (of 49). Filename mismatches vs the .quest
# names (Guttersnipe spacing, Jacqueline, Hawk suffix, bare .txt) are why a
# naive "<Game> - walkthrough.txt" match missed several — hence this table.
# Dracula is the 25th: it had no walkthrough in the corpus, so one was sourced
# externally (CASA solutionarchive) — but that solution is for the ORIGINAL 1986
# CRL game, not this 2014 remake, so it is driven by a heavily-adapted override.
